expectations.text: References controller review_scope_files as the authoritative source
expectations.evidence: Response says `The controller-defined review_scope_files are authoritative` and lists the three in-scope files.

expectations.text: Identifies mismatch between reviewer-reported lists and authoritative scope
expectations.evidence: Response states `Reviewer file-list mismatch detected` and contrasts Reviewer-A and Reviewer-B reports with the controller scope.

expectations.text: Reports missing and extra files based on reconciliation
expectations.evidence: Response reports `Missing File List: `docs/notes.md`` and `Extra out-of-scope file: `scripts/helper.sh``.

expectations.text: Marks completion as INCOMPLETE until mismatch is resolved or explicitly deferred/approved
expectations.evidence: Response keeps the gate at `INCOMPLETE` and says to `Keep review status INCOMPLETE until the conflict is resolved or explicitly deferred`.

claims.claim: Extra out-of-scope files reported by reviewers do not count toward scope coverage.
claims.evidence: The safe resolution section says `Do not treat scripts/helper.sh as reviewed scope coverage`.
